name: opencode-walkthrough
description: A walkthrough for how to execute OpenCode commands in your terminal

startEntries.title: Get Started with OpenCode
startEntries.description: Learn how to run OpenCode commands in your terminal

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with OpenCode
walkthroughs.description: Install the CLI, run prompts, and start interactive sessions for software engineering tasks

steps.title: Install OpenCode
steps.description:
OpenCode is a CLI for software engineering tasks. Install it globally with npm, then confirm with `opencode --version`.
[Install OpenCode](command:opencode-walkthrough.install)

steps.title: Run a Prompt
steps.description:
Pass a prompt directly to OpenCode without interactive mode — generate code, save output to a file, or run one-off tasks.
[Run Inline Prompt](command:opencode-walkthrough.runInline)

steps.title: Start Interactive Mode
steps.description:
Launch OpenCode without arguments to ask follow-ups, refine requests, and iterate on results.
[Start Interactive Session](command:opencode-walkthrough.runInteractive)

steps.title: Tips & Best Practices
steps.description:
Use VS Code's integrated terminal, write specific prompts, and iterate with follow-ups.
[Open Terminal](command:workbench.action.terminal.toggleTerminal)
[Read Documentation](https://opencode.ai)
